summary: Tested Persona Switcher v1 feature for Growth Engine. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All 7 frontend UI tests passed (100%). The persona dropdown, comparison tabs, and analyze with persona_id all work correctly.

test_classes: TestAnalyzeWithoutPersonaId (2 tests) - Analyze without persona_id returns 200, response has expected structure with persona_name
TestAnalyzeWithValidPersonaId (2 tests) - Analyze with valid persona_id returns 200, persona_name matches specified persona
TestAnalyzeWithInvalidPersonaId (2 tests) - Invalid persona_id format returns 400/404, non-existent persona_id returns 404
TestAnalyzePersonaOwnership (1 test) - Analyze with other user's persona_id returns 404
TestExistingFunctionalityStillWorks (3 tests) - Crawl, pages list, page delete all still work
TestCleanup (1 test) - Cleanup TEST_ prefixed personas

features_tested.feature: Persona switcher section visible when page selected
Persona dropdown shows 'Auto (best persona)' as first option
Persona dropdown lists all user's personas (Referral Visitor, Return Visitor, First-Time Visitor)
Analyze with Auto persona returns opportunities and fixes
Comparison tabs appear after analyzing with 2+ personas
Clicking comparison tabs switches displayed results

seed_data_creation: Used existing auto-seeded personas (First-Time Visitor, Return Visitor, Referral Visitor)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Persona Switcher v1 fully tested. The analyze endpoint now accepts optional persona_id parameter. Frontend has persona dropdown above Analyze button, and comparison tabs appear after analyzing with 2+ different personas. All CRUD operations (crawl, pages, delete) still work. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_persona_switcher.py
